ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hoses" (
  "hose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hose type */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the hose */,
  "id_mm" REAL /* Inner diameter of the hose in millimeters */,
  "id_inch" REAL /* Inner diameter of the hose in inches */,
  "od_mm" REAL /* Outer diameter of the hose in millimeters */,
  "od_inch" REAL /* Outer diameter of the hose in inches */,
  "length_m" REAL /* Length of the hose in meters */,
  "length_ft" REAL /* Length of the hose in feet */,
  "min_bend_radius_mm" REAL /* Minimum bend radius of the hose in millimeters */,
  "min_bend_radius_inch" REAL /* Minimum bend radius of the hose in inches */,
  "min_burst_pressure_bar" REAL /* Minimum burst pressure of the hose at 20°C/68°F in bar */,
  "min_burst_pressure_psi" REAL /* Minimum burst pressure of the hose at 20°C/68°F in psi */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the hose */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the hose */,
  "fluid_type" TEXT /* Type of fluid the hose is designed for */,
  "max_flow_rate" REAL /* Maximum flow rate of the hose */,
  "specification_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the hose specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_history" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification record */,
  "hose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hose type */,
  "specification_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the hose specification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_history_hose_id FOREIGN KEY ("hose_id") REFERENCES hoses ("hose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "hose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hose type in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the hose in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* Bin number where the hose is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_hose_id FOREIGN KEY ("hose_id") REFERENCES hoses ("hose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order record */,
  "hose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hose type ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the hose ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "customer" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_hose_id FOREIGN KEY ("hose_id") REFERENCES hoses ("hose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, inventory clerk, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
